description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly red and black color scheme, featuring angular, swept-back wings and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are sharply tapered and integrated into the body, giving the aircraft a delta-like appearance with no visible winglets. The cockpit is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy positioned near the front of the fuselage, suggesting a single-seat configuration. A prominent cylindrical engine is mounted on top of the rear fuselage, indicating a jet propulsion system. The surface is smooth and glossy, with geometric patterns accentuating the aggressive, high-speed design. No visible landing gear is present, and the tail section is minimalistic, blending into the overall aerodynamic form.
description: A futuristic red and black airplane with swept-back delta wings, a single top-mounted jet engine, and a streamlined, glossy body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply pointed nose, wide angular wings, and the dark cockpit canopy at the front.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, slender fuselage, the top-mounted engine, and the smooth, continuous wing profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the cylindrical jet engine, the integration of the wings into the body, and the minimal tail structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same streamlined profile and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalist tail with no distinct vertical stabilizer, integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark canopy
